executive_summary: Build failure detected in repository loginkarun/scib_demo on branch main (attempt 3). The root cause is a CONFIGURATION_ERROR: the GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) is missing or inaccessible, preventing the build from being dispatched. This is a critical infrastructure issue that blocks all build attempts.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build workflow. The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository or is not accessible with the current permissions.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml is missing from the repository at loginkarun/scib_demo on branch main. This could be due to: (1) The file was never created, (2) The file was deleted, (3) The file exists but the path is incorrect, or (4) GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.
errors.impact: CRITICAL - No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or restored. This blocks all CI/CD operations including compilation, testing, and deployment. All build attempts will fail with 404 error.

errors.title: Empty Action URL - No Build Run Initiated
errors.description: The action_url field is empty in all build failure logs, indicating that no GitHub Actions workflow run was successfully initiated. This prevents retrieval of detailed build logs and error diagnostics.
errors.error_message: action_url is empty - no workflow run was created due to 404 error on workflow dispatch
errors.location: GitHub Actions API - Workflow Dispatch Endpoint
errors.root_cause: Because the workflow file does not exist, the GitHub Actions API cannot create a workflow run, resulting in no action URL being generated. This is a cascading effect of ERR-001.
errors.impact: HIGH - Unable to retrieve detailed build logs, Maven output, or specific compilation/test errors. Error analysis is limited to the workflow dispatch failure itself.

recommended_fixes.description: Create the missing .github/workflows/build.yml file with proper Maven build configuration
steps: 2. Create build.yml file with Maven build job configuration
5. Add Maven build steps: clean, compile, test, package
6. Configure artifact upload for build outputs
7. Commit and push the workflow file to main branch
recommended_fixes.validation: Verify workflow file exists at .github/workflows/build.yml and is accessible via GitHub API

recommended_fixes.description: Ensure the GitHub token has proper permissions to access and dispatch workflows
steps: 1. Check if GitHub Actions is enabled for the repository
3. Confirm repository settings allow workflow dispatch
4. Check branch protection rules don't block workflow execution
recommended_fixes.validation: Test workflow dispatch API call returns 204 No Content (success) instead of 404

findings: Build pipeline is non-functional - violates CI/CD compliance requirements
No automated testing or quality gates can be enforced without workflow
Deployment pipeline is blocked - cannot proceed to production
required_actions: Immediate creation of workflow file to restore CI/CD functionality
Implement workflow file protection to prevent future deletion
Add monitoring/alerting for workflow file changes
Document workflow configuration in repository README

analysis_method: Automated error classification from build failure logs
next_steps: Retry build after workflow file is in place
Monitor for successful workflow dispatch (204 response)
Verify build logs are generated and accessible
If build fails after workflow creation, re-run error classification to analyze Maven/compilation errors
